_meta.description: Global economic indicators: DATA (per-country metrics), SRCS (metric metadata), CSRCS (per-country official sources).

mwLocal.label: الحد الأدنى للأجور (محلي/شهريًا)
mwLocal.note: Monthly statutory minimum wage in the country's own currency. Hover any mwLocal/mwUSD cell → tooltip shows the exact ministry / decree URL that mentions this amount. 9 regional verification agents cross-checked 117 countries against official sources.

mwUSD.label: الحد الأدنى للأجور (دولار/شهريًا)
mwUSD.note: Monthly minimum wage converted to USD using ECB / central-bank reference rates on 22 Apr 2026, with GCC pegs held fixed. Hour/day/week rates converted at 173.33 h, 22 d, 4.333 wk per month.

infl.label: معدل التضخم
infl.note: Annual consumer price inflation (CPI %). Primary source: national statistics office. International reference: IMF WEO April 2025.

intr.label: سعر الفائدة
intr.src: National Central Bank / World Bank Lending Rate
intr.note: Policy or lending interest rate (% per annum). Primary source: each country's central bank. Fallback: World Bank.

unemp.label: معدل البطالة
unemp.note: Unemployment as % of total labour force. Primary source: national statistics office. International reference: ILO modelled estimates 2025.

avgW.label: متوسط الراتب (دولار/شهريًا)
avgW.note: Mean monthly wages in USD. Source: national statistics office or ILO Global Wage Database. Latest available for each country.

gdpPc.label: الناتج المحلي للفرد
gdpPc.note: GDP per capita in current USD. Primary source: national statistics office. International reference: IMF WEO April 2025.

nomGDP.label: الناتج المحلي الإجمالي الاسمي
nomGDP.note: Total nominal GDP in current USD. Primary source: national statistics office. International reference: IMF WEO April 2025.

fx.label: سعر الصرف
fx.src: Open Exchange Rates (live) / World Bank Official Rate
fx.note: Official exchange rate: local currency units per 1 USD. Live rates sourced directly from Open Exchange Rates API (updated every 48h). Fallback: World Bank official rate.

USA.laborMinistry: U.S. Department of Labor, Wage & Hour Division
USA.mwEffective: Washington DC: $17.95/hr (1 Jul 2025). Federal floor $7.25 applies elsewhere.
USA.mwScope: Federal: $7.25/hr (unchanged since 2009). 30 states + DC have higher rates. Washington state: $17.13/hr; DC: $17.95/hr (highest).

GBR.laborMinistry: GOV.UK / Low Pay Commission — United Kingdom
GBR.mwScope: National Living Wage £12.71/hr (age 21+) from 1 Apr 2026. NMW 18-20: £10.85. Under 18/apprentice: £8.00.

DEU.laborMinistry: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (BMAS) — Germany
DEU.mwScope: Gesetzlicher Mindestlohn €13.90/hr from 1 Jan 2026 (→ €14.60/hr from 1 Jan 2027). Monthly full-time ≈ €2,410.

FRA.statsOffice: INSEE – Institut national de la statistique
FRA.mwScope: SMIC brut mensuel €1,823.03 (€12.02/hr × 151.67h). Net ≈ €1,443.11. Mayotte: 87.5% of SMIC.

ITA.laborMinistry: Ministero del Lavoro e delle Politiche Sociali — Italy
ITA.mwEffective: ~€1,700/mo typical sectoral CBA floor (no statutory MW)
ITA.mwScope: No statutory minimum wage. Effective wages set by sectoral collective agreements (~€1,400–€2,000/mo range).

ESP.laborMinistry: Boletín Oficial del Estado / Ministerio de Trabajo y Economía Social — Spain
ESP.mwScope: SMI €1,221/mo × 14 pagas = €17,094/yr. Or €40.70/day. Exempt from IRPF income tax.

NLD.statsOffice: CBS – Centraal Bureau voor de Statistiek
NLD.mwScope: WML €14.71/hr (age 21+) from 1 Jan 2026. Reviewed every 6 months. Under-21 scales apply.

BEL.laborMinistry: SPF Emploi, Travail et Concertation Sociale — Belgium (Verified 2026)
BEL.centralBank: Nationale Bank van België / Banque Nationale
BEL.mwScope: GMMMI — workers 18+; +€35.70 real increase above indexation

SWE.mwEffective: No statutory MW; ~SEK 28,000/mo typical CBA floor (~90% coverage)
SWE.mwScope: ~90% covered by sectoral CBAs; opposed EU Minimum Wage Directive

NOR.mwScope: 9 sectors have binding CBA extensions (construction skilled NOK 240.96/hr); others by market

DNK.mwEffective: No statutory MW; ~DKK 19,500/mo typical sectoral CBA floor

FIN.laborMinistry: Ministry of Social Affairs and Health — Finland (Verified 2026)
FIN.mwEffective: No statutory MW; ~€1,900/mo typical universally-binding CBA floor
FIN.mwScope: ~90% covered by universally binding sectoral CBAs; €1,700-2,300/mo typical

AUT.mwScope: Set entirely through collective bargaining (Kollektivverträge); ~95% of workers covered, de facto ~€1,700-2,000/mo

CHE.mwEffective: Geneva cantonal CHF 24.59/hr (highest); Federal: none (2014 referendum). Bern: no cantonal MW.
CHE.mwScope: No federal MW. Cantonal: Geneva CHF 24.59, Basel-Stadt 22.20, Jura 21.40, Neuchâtel 21.35, Ticino 20.00-20.50. Bern: none (CBA-based).

PRT.mwScope: Salário Mínimo Nacional mainland; paid 14× annually; target €1,020 by 2028

GRC.mwScope: Workers 0-3 yrs experience; €41.09/day for blue collar; target €950 by 2027

POL.laborMinistry: Ministerstwo Rodziny, Pracy i Polityki Społecznej — Poland
POL.mwScope: Płaca minimalna PLN 4,806/mo or PLN 31.40/hr from 1 Jan 2026. Council of Ministers decree 12 Jun 2025.

HUN.mwScope: Gross; +11% from HUF 290,800 to HUF 322,800; guaranteed (secondary ed) HUF 373,200

ROU.mwScope: Gross Jan-Jun; rises to RON 4,325 Jul-Dec 2026; 1.76M employees affected

SVK.statsOffice: ŠÚ SR – Štatistický úrad Slovenskej republiky
SVK.laborMinistry: Ministerstvo práce, sociálnych vecí a rodiny

SVN.laborMinistry: Ministrstvo za delo, družino, socialne zadeve

LUX.statsOffice: STATEC – Institut national de la statistique
LUX.laborMinistry: Agence pour le développement de l'emploi (ADEM)

CYP.mwScope: Full-time employees 18+ after 6 months (€979 first 6 months); excludes hotel/domestic/maritime

MCO.statsOffice: IMSEE – Institut monégasque de la statistique
MCO.centralBank: N/A (uses EUR via Banque de France)

SMR.statsOffice: Ufficio Statistica – Repubblica di San Marino
SMR.laborMinistry: Segreteria di Stato per il Lavoro
SMR.centralBank: Banca Centrale della Repubblica di San Marino

SGP.mwScope: Food services PWM entry; rising to SGD 2,500 by 2028

HKG.laborMinistry: Chief Executive in Council SMW Recommendation — Hong Kong (Verified 2026)
HKG.mwScope: Universal SMW; +HKD 1.00 from HKD 42.10 to HKD 43.10; monthly cap HKD 17,600

MAC.laborMinistry: Direcção dos Serviços para os Assuntos Laborais

JPN.laborMinistry: Ministry of Health, Labour & Welfare (MHLW) — Japan
JPN.mwScope: National weighted average ¥1,121/hr (Oct 2025). Tokyo ¥1,226 (highest); Kōchi/Miyazaki/Okinawa ¥1,023 (lowest). Kumamoto/Ōita postponed to Jan 2026; Akita to Mar 2026.

KOR.laborMinistry: Minimum Wage Council / Ministry of Employment & Labor (MoEL) — South Korea
KOR.mwScope: KRW 10,320/hr from 1 Jan 2026 (+2.9%). Monthly (209 hrs): KRW 2,156,880.

TWN.statsOffice: DGBAS – Directorate-General of Budget, Accounting & Statistics
TWN.centralBank: Central Bank of the Republic of China (CBC)

CHN.laborMinistry: Ministry of Human Resources & Social Security (MOHRSS)
CHN.mwScope: No national rate. Shanghai ¥2,740/mo (highest); Beijing ¥2,540/mo. Beijing hourly: ¥27.7/hr (highest).

MNG.statsOffice: NSO – National Statistics Office of Mongolia

PRK.statsOffice: CBS – Central Bureau of Statistics DPRK

IND.laborMinistry: Delhi Labour Department / Chief Labour Commissioner (clc.gov.in)
IND.mwScope: Central sphere unskilled: ₹20,358/mo (₹783/day × 26). Delhi unskilled: ₹19,846/mo. Varies by state & skill level. VDA revised Apr/Oct.

PAK.mwScope: Punjab unskilled; federal PKR 37,000; Sindh up to PKR 50,868 by skill; Baluchistan PKR 37,000

BGD.mwScope: RMG Grade 5 only; no national statutory minimum; 9% annual increments

NPL.statsOffice: CBS – Central Bureau of Statistics Nepal
NPL.mwScope: Basic NPR 12,170 + DA NPR 7,380; +13% from NPR 17,300; tea plantation separate

LKA.statsOffice: DCS – Dept. of Census & Statistics Sri Lanka
LKA.mwScope: Private sector; +LKR 3,000 from LKR 27,000; daily LKR 1,200

MMR.mwScope: Private sector ≥10 workers; base MMK 4,800/day smaller firms; ≈USD 3.72/day

THA.mwScope: Bangkok (highest); varies THB 337-400 by province; target THB 600/day by 2027

VNM.statsOffice: GSO – General Statistics Office of Vietnam

KHM.statsOffice: NIS – National Institute of Statistics Cambodia

IDN.mwScope: UMP Jakarta (highest province); +6.17% from 2025; varies by province; IDR 5,729,876/month

BRN.mwScope: Sectoral (9 sub-sectors); no universal minimum; part-time BND 2.62/hr

AFG.mwScope: Nominal only; no private sector statutory enforcement under Taliban gov't

SAU.laborMinistry: Ministry of Human Resources & Social Development (HRSD)
SAU.mwScope: Applies ONLY to Saudi nationals for Saudization counting. Sector-specific: SAR 5,500 marketing/sales (Jan 2026); SAR 5,000 tech engineering; SAR 9,000 dentistry.

ARE.laborMinistry: Ministry of Human Resources & Emiratisation (MOHRE) — UAE
ARE.mwScope: Applies ONLY to Emirati nationals in private sector (Emiratisation). Raised from AED 5,000 → AED 6,000 effective 1 Jan 2026. Compliance deadline 30 Jun 2026. No universal statutory min for expats.

QAT.laborMinistry: Ministry of Administrative Development, Labour & Social Affairs (MADLSA) — Qatar
QAT.mwScope: QAR 1,000 basic + 500 accommodation + 300 food = QAR 1,800 total if employer provides neither. Applies to ALL private-sector workers incl. domestic.

KWT.statsOffice: PACI / CSB – Public Authority for Civil Information
KWT.laborMinistry: Ministry of Social Affairs & Labour — Kuwait
KWT.mwScope: KWD 75/mo for all private-sector workers (Kuwaitis + expats). Domestic workers: KWD 60/mo. Unchanged since 2017.

BHR.statsOffice: NCSI – National Centre for Statistics & Information
BHR.laborMinistry: Labour Market Regulatory Authority (LMRA) / Civil Service Bureau — Bahrain
BHR.mwScope: Bahraini nationals in PUBLIC sector only: BHD 300 (high-school), 350 (diploma), 400–500 (bachelor). No statutory min for private sector or expats (~55% of workforce).

OMN.statsOffice: NCSI – National Centre for Statistics & Information
OMN.laborMinistry: Ministry of Labour — Sultanate of Oman
OMN.mwScope: OMR 225 basic + OMR 100 allowance = OMR 325 for Omani nationals only. No statutory min for expat workers. Increase to OMR 360–400 under discussion but no new decree.

JOR.laborMinistry: Ministry of Labour — Jordan / Petra news agency
JOR.mwScope: JOD 290/mo for all private-sector workers from 1 Jan 2025 through 31 Dec 2027. Set by Trilateral Committee for Labor Affairs.

IRQ.mwScope: No increase since Nov 2022; Kurdish Region separate rates

IRN.mwScope: +60% from IRR 103.9M to ~166.2M; ≈16.6M Toman informally; labour unions demanded IRR 600M

LBN.mwScope: +56% from LBP 18M; ≈USD 313 at market FX; review scheduled +6 mo

SYR.statsOffice: CBS – Central Bureau of Statistics Syria
SYR.mwScope: New Syrian Pound (100 old = 1 new); ≈USD 110; +50% public sector package

PSE.statsOffice: PCBS – Palestinian Central Bureau of Statistics

YEM.mwScope: No reliable enforcement; rate unchanged since 2012 despite currency collapse

DJI.statsOffice: DISED – Direction de la Statistique et des Études Démographiques
DJI.mwEffective: No private sector minimum (2006 Labour Code abolished)
DJI.mwScope: Public DJF 35,000; private sector wages by CBA/individual agreement

RUS.mwScope: Federal MROT; +20.7% from RUB 22,440; ~4.6M workers affected; regions set higher

UKR.statsOffice: SSSU – State Statistics Service of Ukraine
UKR.laborMinistry: State Budget Law 2026 / Verkhovna Rada — Ukraine (Verified 2026)
UKR.mwScope: +UAH 647 from UAH 8,000; UAH 52/hr; no further 2026 increase

BLR.centralBank: National Bank of the Republic of Belarus (NBRB)

MDA.statsOffice: NBS – National Bureau of Statistics Moldova

GEO.statsOffice: GeoStat – National Statistics Office of Georgia

ARM.laborMinistry: Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs — Armenia
ARM.mwScope: Unchanged since 1999; proposed AMD 85,000 not enacted

MKD.laborMinistry: Ministry of Economy and Labor — N. Macedonia (Verified 2026)

NGA.statsOffice: NBS – National Bureau of Statistics Nigeria

EGY.mwScope: Private sector; public sector rising to EGP 8,000 July 2026; hourly EGP 28

KEN.statsOffice: KNBS – Kenya National Bureau of Statistics
